questions.question: Which natural feature divides the Lakshadweep islands into two broad parts?
The Andaman and Nicobar Islands are separated by which water body?
In which of the following Indian states is the Sundarbans Biosphere Reserve located?
Which of the following tribes is mainly found in the north-eastern part of India?
What happens to tectonic plates at divergent boundaries?
questions.option_4: They move away from each other.

questions.question: Which of the following is a multipurpose river valley project?
Which of the following Biosphere Reserves is located in Tamil Nadu?
Which weathering process involves the peeling of rock layers due to temperature variations?
Which of the following characteristics is true about the Northern Plains?
questions.option_1: Densely populated due to fertile soil
questions.option_2: Low fertility due to rocky terrain

questions.question: Which water bodies flank the Peninsular Plateau on the east and west?
questions.option_1: Bay of Bengal and Arabian Sea
questions.option_3: Bay of Bengal and Indian Ocean

questions.question: In the Great Indian Plains of India, which kind of soil is found on a large scale?
What is the main advantage of road transport over railways?
questions.option_2: Cheaper and faster than railway transport over long distances

questions.question: Which mountain range forms the eastern boundary of the Deccan Plateau?
Wildlife sanctuaries in India are primarily established for:
What is the most common cause of tsunamis?
Which of the coastal plain is called the 'Hexadeltaic region' or the 'Gift of Six Rivers'?
Which of the following Indian states has the highest elevation point in India (excluding POK)?
The Mediterranean region is best known for which type of vegetation?
What geographic feature primarily controls the eastern boundary of the Indian Desert?
Which of the following is NOT a part of urban transport infrastructure?
Which of the following ranges separates the Kashmir Valley from the rest of the Himalayan region?
Which Australian plateau is formed by the solidification of molten lava?
What is the name of the Super Expressway that links the metropolitan cities of New Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai and Kolkata?
In which Indian state is Rushikonda Beach, which received the Blue Flag Beach certification in 2023, located?
What defines land as “Culturable Wasteland” in land revenue records in India?
questions.option_2: Land that is fallow for over five years
